name: Recruiter: draft an InMail to a candidate (NO SEND)
description: Opens the InMail composer for one candidate and STOPS — it does NOT click Send. The composer auto-fills an AI-drafted body for a human to review. To actually send, a human reviews and clicks Enviar (button[aria-label='Enviar este mensaje']) — intentionally NOT in this flow (each send burns an InMail credit; sending requires explicit approval). To customize before sending: type into the body div[role='textbox'], the subject input[placeholder='Añade un asunto'], or pick a template via input[placeholder='Busca una plantilla…']. Params: the entry button name (step 3) + pipeline/candidate. Selectors captured live 2026-06-08; same composer is used by the bulk-message flow (which additionally needs the pipeline select-all + 'Mensaje (N)' bulk-bar selectors — still TODO).

steps.intent: Open InMail composer for the candidate
